title: Leveraged tokens on Hyperliquid ft. Bouncetech
summary_title: Leverage tokens on Hyperliquid: no liquidation, composable perps, explosive upside
summary_description: Bounce Tech brings non-liquidating leveraged tokens to Hyperliquid, combining HyperCore perps with ERC-20 composability.

key_moments.label: Louis introduces Bounce Tech, CEO background in computer science
Definition: leveraged tokens as non-liquidating, constant-leverage perpetuals
Composable ERC-20 tokens enable DeFi integration and funding rate strategies
Volatility decay explained: rebalancing costs in sideways, volatile markets
HyperEVM precompiles unlock composable perp liquidity for leverage tokens
Delta-neutral LP strategy: short leverage token paired with spot equivalent
HIP3 markets coming soon with higher leverage factors up to 10x
Points campaign confirmed, token launch planned

pull_quote: Non-liquidated, non-liquidating leveraged exposure is usually very interesting to institutional players
